metadata.title: Juan Pablo Ceron Fernandez | Senior Software Engineer
metadata.description: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer based in Colombia. Specializing in React, Node.js, AWS cloud infrastructure, micro frontends, and AI-powered solutions.

hero.titleLine: Senior Full Stack Engineer  |  React & Next.js  |  AWS & Cloud  |  AI Integration
hero.paragraph1: I design and build scalable full-stack solutions and enterprise platforms that solve real business problems — from micro frontends and distributed architectures to cloud infrastructure and AI-powered automation.
hero.paragraph2: 5+ years delivering production systems with React, Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS — leading technical initiatives end-to-end, from requirements to deployment.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.body: Senior Software Engineer with 5 years of experience designing and delivering scalable software across different industries. Specialized in full-stack development with a strong focus on frontend architecture, micro frontends, cloud infrastructure, and AI automation. I lead technical initiatives end-to-end — from requirements and solution design to execution and delivery — adapting fast to new challenges while maintaining quality and performance.

projects.label: SELECTED WORK
projects.title: PROJECTS.
projects.item0Description: Quant research multi-agent pipeline: Claude API tool_use, yfinance ingestion, Pydantic contracts between agents, walk-forward CV, Parquet + JSON logs — Python.
projects.item1Description: Flask web app to estimate home prices: multiple OLS regression (statsmodels), statistical analysis, 95% confidence intervals, REST API, interactive Leaflet map — Saratoga Houses dataset.
projects.item2Description: Tamper-proof supply chain records using blockchain + IPFS

ai.label: AI ENGINEERING
ai.cap0Description: Business process optimization using AI models to reduce operational time and eliminate manual bottlenecks
ai.cap1Description: Intelligent conversational tools that improve user experience and streamline internal workflows
ai.cap2Description: Production systems built on AWS Rekognition, Liveness Detection, and cloud-native AI for real-world security use cases
ai.cap3Description: Integrating AI assistants and copilots into engineering workflows for faster, higher-quality delivery
ai.footerNote: Currently using Claude, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot as daily engineering tools

experience.label: WORK HISTORY
experience.title: EXPERIENCE
